corpus_binding.interpretation: Accepted public-documentation roles remain unchanged with null oracle and candidate evidence. The hierarchy assigns no stream-info, info, desc, serialization, or endpoint role.

composition.relationship: XmlElementTree validates the original caller-owned parent-before-child candidate-node Vec containing accepted name-only containers and accepted leaves, then retains that Vec unchanged beside validated limits.

resource_policy.retained_utf8_bytes: Checked sum of owned container names, leaf names, and represented character data.
resource_policy.scratch: One private iterative Vec is fallibly reserved before per-node validation.

does_not_prove: mixed content, complete XML tree or document behavior, attributes, namespaces, declarations, comments, processing instructions, CDATA sections, schemas, or queries
tag spelling, caller-order serialization meaning, parsing, decoding, mutation, serialization, canonicalization, or raw-byte output
MetadataTree conversion, StreamDefinition or StreamDescriptor projection, info or desc roles, stream-info meaning, or LSL field mapping
official liblsl behavior, oracle observation, candidate differential evidence, endpoint representation, or compatibility
dependency, feature, unsafe, I/O, protocol, wire, discovery, transport, runtime, adapter, provider, FFI, device, or authority behavior
